title: centaurea × trauttmannii
intro: Centaurea × trauttmannii, a hybrid plant within the asteraceae family, is a perennial flower known for its vibrant blue to purple blooms. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and skin issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea × trauttmannii include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or orally, although its safety and efficacy need further research.
